sec_financial_statement_data.notes: Use filed/accepted timestamps. The SEC warns structured extracts may contain filer or extraction errors.

sec_company_tickers_exchange.notes: Current mapping only; never backfill historical ticker identity without filing-time confirmation.

price_dataset.notes: Hash every shard. Cross-check coverage. Not exchange-grade and not sufficient for executable intraday claims.

historical_membership.notes: Historical S&P membership since 1996. Repository itself notes early-history and price-data limitations.

nasdaq_current_universe.notes: Engineering/current universe only; not a historical universe.
